bearerAuth.description: Better Auth session token from sign-in/sign-up (`token` field or `set-auth-token` header)

token.description: Session token — paste into Scalar Authorize (bearerAuth) to call protected routes

latitude.description: Latitude must have at most 2 digits before and 8 after the decimal point

longitude.description: Longitude must have at most 3 digits before and 8 after the decimal point

latitude.description: Latitude must have at most 2 digits before and 8 after the decimal point

longitude.description: Longitude must have at most 3 digits before and 8 after the decimal point

get.description: Retrieve a list of all activities

requestBody.description: The activity data to be created and optional place IDs to associate

get.description: Retrieve an activity by ID

requestBody.description: The activity data to be updated

post.summary: Sign up with email and password
post.description: Creates a Sawa user via Better Auth. Copy `token` from the response, then use Scalar **Authorize → bearerAuth** before calling protected routes like `/places`.

requestBody.description: Email/password sign-up with required Sawa profile fields

set-auth-token.description: Better Auth session token (same value as `token` in the JSON body). Use as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` in Scalar.

400.description: Invalid request body or validation error

422.description: Email already in use or profile constraint failed

post.summary: Sign in with email and password
post.description: Returns a session token for API testing. Paste `token` into Scalar **Authorize → bearerAuth** to call protected routes.

requestBody.description: Email and password credentials

set-auth-token.description: Better Auth session token (same value as `token` in the JSON body). Use as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` in Scalar.

get.description: Returns the active session when a valid bearer token or session cookie is sent. Use this to verify your Scalar authorization token.

post.description: Invalidates the current session. Requires the bearer token used to sign in.

401.description: No valid session to sign out

put.description: Update an existing event by its ID

requestBody.description: Event data to update

403.description: You don't have permission to delete this resource

post.description: Publish an event by setting its 'isPublished' status to true

get.summary: Get all steps for an event
get.description: Retrieve all steps associated with an event, ordered by day and step order

post.summary: Create a new step for an event
post.description:
Create a new step for an event. The 'eventID' and 'suggestedBy' fields are automatically set from the URL parameter and authenticated user respectively.

**Child Steps (Variants):** To create a child step (variant) of an existing step, provide the 'originalStepID' field. Child steps inherit all fields from the parent step, but you can override any field except 'placeID'. If you change the place, it creates a new step (not a child). If the parent step is itself a child, the new step becomes a sibling (child of the same parent). Duplicate detection prevents creating steps with identical field values.

requestBody.description: Event step data. Include 'originalStepID' to create a child step variant.

400.description: Invalid step data, duplicate step, or invalid parent step

get.summary: Get all attendees for an event
get.description: Retrieve all attendees associated with an event

post.description: RSVP to an event by creating or updating the attendee status. The 'eventID', 'userID', and 'responseTime' fields are automatically set from the URL parameter, authenticated user, and current timestamp respectively.

requestBody.description: RSVP data (status and role)

get.summary: Get all child steps (variants) of a step
get.description: Retrieve all child steps (variants) for a specific parent step. Child steps are variants of a parent step with modified fields.

200.description: Successful response with list of child steps

post.description: Vote on a suggestion step in an event. User must be an attendee and voting must be open.

409.description: User already voted for this step

get.description: Get all votes for a specific step with total count.

200.description: Successful response with votes and count

delete.summary: Remove user's vote from a step
delete.description: Remove the authenticated user's vote from a suggestion step while voting is still open.

parameters.name: mediaID
parameters.description: The ID of the media to delete

post.summary: Create or toggle a reaction on a place
post.description:
Create a new reaction for a place. If the user has already reacted:
    - If it's the same reaction type, the reaction will be removed (toggle off)
    - If it's a different reaction type, the existing reaction will be updated

requestBody.description: The reaction data to be created

200.description: The updated reaction (when changing reaction type)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the reaction to update

requestBody.description: The new reaction type

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the reaction to delete
